sections.paragraph:
Original: איד

Transliteration: 'êyd

Phonetic: ade

BDB Definition:

  1. distress, burden, calamity
    1. burden (of the righteous)
    2. calamity (of nation)
    3. disaster (of wicked)
    4. day of calamity

Origin: from the same as H181 (in the sense of bending down)

TWOT entry: 38c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
